description: Unspecified vulnerability in ASSA ABLOY APTUS Styra Porttelefonkort 4400 before A2 has unknown impact and attack vectors.
Claude Reasoning: ASSA ABLOY Aptus is an access-control/door-entry system for multi-dwelling residential buildings (this is a door-phone board); it governs building door access but is a professionally-managed building system rather than a consumer home smart lock.
Codex Reasoning: APTUS Styra Porttelefonkort is commercial access-control hardware, not a residential smart lock.

description: Incorrect Default Permissions, : Execution with Unnecessary Privileges, : Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource vulnerability in ASSA ABLOY Visionline on Windows allows Configuration/Environment Manipulation.This issue affects Visionline: from 1.0 before 1.33.
Claude Reasoning: ASSA ABLOY Visionline is hospitality (hotel) electronic-lock management software running on Windows - a commercial lock-system server, not a consumer home smart lock.
Codex Reasoning: ASSA ABLOY Visionline is hospitality access-control software on Windows, not a consumer home smart lock.
